description_long: This house features a modern, geometric design with a combination of flat and gently sloped roofs, creating a dynamic silhouette. The exterior is characterized by a bold contrast of black and white, with large rectangular windows and a prominent entryway. A spacious deck or patio area extends from one side, providing outdoor living space. The structure appears to be a single-story building with multiple interconnected volumes, each with its own roof section. The windows are arranged in an asymmetrical pattern, contributing to the contemporary aesthetic. The main entrance is accentuated by a double door and a small overhang, offering a welcoming focal point.
description: A modern, single-story house with bold black and white exterior, asymmetrical windows, and a spacious deck. The design features flat and sloped roofs with a prominent entryway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with double doors, large windows, and the geometric roof structure.
description_view_1: Rear or side view highlighting the extended rooflines and minimal window openings, emphasizing the building's massing.
description_view_2: View of the deck or patio area, with large windows and doors opening onto the outdoor space.
description_view_3: Side view with fewer windows, showing the solid wall sections and the continuation of the roof geometry.
attribute_entryway_design: Double door entry with small overhang, minimal steps, and clean modern lines
